prompt: Outfit: a dusty beige to pale pink-beige fitted-and-flared mini dress in fine vertically ribbed stretch knit, featuring a wide rounded neckline worn normally without shifting, short fitted cap sleeves resting correctly over both shoulders, a broad knitted shoulder-and-upper-chest yoke, a large horizontal upper-chest cutout built into the garment rather than created by slipped styling, and a close-fitting bandeau-like ribbed bust panel connected to the lower edge of the yoke by two narrow vertical knit straps, with slim knit cords positioned at both outer upper-bust edges, each cord kept tied into a small relaxed bow with long tails hanging downward rather than left undone, followed by a closely fitted elongated torso extending to the low hips, an additional pair of narrow center-front waist cords tied into a small loose bow with long ends hanging toward the hip seam, and a low-waisted gathered seam releasing into a short single-tier softly flared mini skirt, the skirt hem left completely untucked, unfolded, unknotted, and unlifted, with no visible buttons, zipper, or hooks, paired with slim black tall boots in smooth leather-like or stretch material, featuring close-fitting shafts continuing beneath the mini hem with the shaft openings hidden, closed softly rounded toes, and unseen heel, sole, and closure construction left unspecified, plus a small-to-medium structured ivory or cream handbag in finely grained leather-like material with a softly rounded trapezoidal body, front flap, rectangular gold-tone clasp, short arched top handle, and an attached slim long shoulder strap, carried on the forearm by the short top handle while the long strap remains attached and hangs loosely in front rather than being worn on the shoulder or crossbody, without charms or decorative keychains, along with a minimal random mix of small silver-tone earrings with restrained clear-stone and generalized interlocking-loop emblem details, with premium knit texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, refined cutout and neckline finishing, visible seams, natural seam tension, believable knit weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, real folds, detailed gathered construction, realistic layered depth, believable tie tension, natural fabric contouring, polished metal hardware, believable bag-handle contact, secure accessory placement, and well-made everyday clothing realism, not costume-like or cheap-looking.
promptEn: Outfit: a dusty beige to pale pink-beige fitted-and-flared mini dress in fine vertically ribbed stretch knit, featuring a wide rounded neckline worn normally without shifting, short fitted cap sleeves resting correctly over both shoulders, a broad knitted shoulder-and-upper-chest yoke, a large horizontal upper-chest cutout built into the garment rather than created by slipped styling, and a close-fitting bandeau-like ribbed bust panel connected to the lower edge of the yoke by two narrow vertical knit straps, with slim knit cords positioned at both outer upper-bust edges, each cord kept tied into a small relaxed bow with long tails hanging downward rather than left undone, followed by a closely fitted elongated torso extending to the low hips, an additional pair of narrow center-front waist cords tied into a small loose bow with long ends hanging toward the hip seam, and a low-waisted gathered seam releasing into a short single-tier softly flared mini skirt, the skirt hem left completely untucked, unfolded, unknotted, and unlifted, with no visible buttons, zipper, or hooks, paired with slim black tall boots in smooth leather-like or stretch material, featuring close-fitting shafts continuing beneath the mini hem with the shaft openings hidden, closed softly rounded toes, and unseen heel, sole, and closure construction left unspecified, plus a small-to-medium structured ivory or cream handbag in finely grained leather-like material with a softly rounded trapezoidal body, front flap, rectangular gold-tone clasp, short arched top handle, and an attached slim long shoulder strap, carried on the forearm by the short top handle while the long strap remains attached and hangs loosely in front rather than being worn on the shoulder or crossbody, without charms or decorative keychains, along with a minimal random mix of small silver-tone earrings with restrained clear-stone and generalized interlocking-loop emblem details, with premium knit texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, refined cutout and neckline finishing, visible seams, natural seam tension, believable knit weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, real folds, detailed gathered construction, realistic layered depth, believable tie tension, natural fabric contouring, polished metal hardware, believable bag-handle contact, secure accessory placement, and well-made everyday clothing realism, not costume-like or cheap-looking.
promptZh: 服装：一件 灰米色至浅粉米色 的修身微喇迷你裙，采用精细的竖条纹弹力针织面料制成。设计包括一个宽大的圆领，正常穿着不偏移；短款合身盖肩袖，平整地覆盖在双肩上；宽大的针织肩部及上胸拼接；上胸部设有一个大型横向镂空，镂空为服装自带设计而非通过穿着方式形成；胸部下方为紧身抹胸式罗纹面板，通过两条细长的垂直针织带与上部拼接边缘相连。在上胸部两侧外缘各有一条细针织绳，每条绳子系成一个小巧自然的蝴蝶结，长长的尾端自然垂下，而非散开。修长的躯干部分紧贴身体延伸至低腰处，腰部正中另有一对细针织绳系成小巧松散的蝴蝶结，长尾端垂向臀部接缝。低腰处设有褶皱接缝，连接至单层短款微喇迷你裙摆，裙摆下缘自然垂落，未塞入、未折叠、未打结、未卷起。无可见纽扣、拉链或挂钩。搭配一双修身的 黑色高筒靴，采用光滑皮革质感或弹力材质，靴筒紧贴腿部并延伸至裙摆下方，靴口被遮盖，鞋头为柔和的圆头，鞋跟、鞋底及闭合结构未作具体说明。此外，搭配一个中小型结构感 象牙白或奶油色 手提包，采用细纹皮革质感材质，包身呈柔和的梯形，配有前翻盖、长方形金色金属扣、短弧形手柄及一条附带的细长肩带。手提包通过短手柄挂在小臂上，长肩带保持连接并自然垂在包前，而非背在肩上或斜挎。无挂饰或装饰性钥匙扣。搭配极简风格的银色耳环，带有低调的透明宝石和通用的互扣环标志细节。整体呈现高级针织质感、写实的服装结构、干净的缝线、精致的镂空与领口处理、可见的接缝、自然的缝线张力、真实的针织重量感、细微的褶皱、逼真的垂坠感、真实的折痕、精细的褶皱结构、真实的层叠深度、可信的系带张力、自然的织物轮廓、精致的金属五金件、逼真的手柄接触感、稳固的配饰位置，以及做工精良的日常服装质感，避免廉价的戏服感。
